g.text: Bank Conflict Scenarios in Shared Memory
32 banks × 4 bytes/bank = 128-byte bank width | Warp = 32 threads
FIX: Padding breaks bank conflict pattern
All threads access same bank (column read)
Bank 0 | T0, T1, T2, ... T31 all access

text.tspan: // Column-major read = all threads hit same bank
// When threadIdx.y is constant across warp:
// Column-major read = all threads hit same bank
// When threadIdx.y is constant across warp:
// Padding shifts each row by 1 bank
// Now column access hits different banks!
// Padding shifts each row by 1 bank
// Now column access hits different banks!
